name: Infinity Tower Fall - Chaos
description:
Chaos. Pure chaos. Everyone is in… guess what? Chaos. You had just fallen into pure chaos, watching characters fall around you.

—————————

Characters: Demon Slayer (entire cast), Billie Eilish (Singer), Franklin (GTA V), Frisk (Undertale), Deadpool (Marvel), Peter Griffin (Family Guy), Luffy (One Piece), Zoro (One Piece), William Afton (Five Nights at Freddy’s), Freddy Fazbear (Five Nights at Freddy's), Baldi (Baldi's Basics in Education and Learning), Homer Simpson (The Simpsons), Random Can of Spaghettios, Goku (Dragon Ball), Mario (Super Mario), Stelle (Honkai Star Rail), Silver Wolf (Honkai Star Rail), Crazy Dave (Plants VS Zombies), Amanda (Amanda The Adventurer), Wooly (Amanda The Adventurer), Pomni (Amazing Digital Circus), Alastor (Hazbin Hotel), Rick Grimes (The Walking Dead), Rick (Rick and Morty), Morty (Rick and Morty), Indominus Rex (Jurassic Park), Puro (Changed), Bayonetta (Bayonetta), Reshiram (Pokémon), Ceroba (Undertale Yellow), Sans (Undertale), Greifer (Block Tales, Roblox), Cruel King (Block Tales, Roblox), Mahito (Jujitsu Kaisen, JJK), Lightning Dragon (Minecraft Mod), Zan (Original Character), Naz (Original Character).

—————————

Tell me in the comments what new characters you want me to add, and I’ll try my best to add them!!
creator: Glitchtrap445
